Failure: APFB installed example fails for zoo input
Root Cause: Installed-package APFB example exercised the indexed preprocessing path with zoo input, so fragile oldrel alignment behavior surfaced during examples.
Notes: Repaired by stabilizing alignment and reducing the APFB example to a deterministic minimal zoo case.

Failure: zoo preprocessing yields unexpected missing-value failure
Root Cause: Value-based zoo subsetting by common index could introduce NA rows on oldrel rather than preserving only matched pairs.
Notes: Repaired with ordered position-based matching on common index values.

Failure: xts preprocessing yields subscript out of bounds
Root Cause: Value-based xts subsetting by common index could trigger positional mismatch and subscript errors on oldrel.
Notes: Repaired with ordered position-based matching on common index values.

Failure: repeated zoo warnings indicate fragile index-subsetting behavior
Root Cause: The preprocessing path relied on direct indexed subsetting instead of deterministic position-based common-index alignment.
Notes: Repaired by rejecting non-unique indexed inputs deterministically and avoiding fragile direct subset calls.
